name: RPlog_An_Unscrupulous_Undertaking_Atrocious_Arrangements_Pt_2
title: An Unscrupulous Undertaking: Atrocious Arrangements (Part 2)
summary: Returning to the Corporate Sector station, the ISB agent Corentin is escorted by a Vaathkree deck officer to the office of the VicePrex Zeak Oppenhiemer, who announces he has assembled all the pieces of their illicit weapons deal. Oppenhiemer reveals that the Hutts' new Falleen major domo has agreed to serve as the transfer point and lays out the cost structure: the Trandoshans' payment, plus the Etti Group's fee at market price with fifteen percent overhead to cover bribes, fuel, and profit. Corentin, initially balking at the figures, comes around as Oppenhiemer patiently separates the distinct costs, and proposes five thousand units up front to take back to his superiors. The agent's cold smile finally warms as the arrangements fall into place, and the two clasp hands on the deal. As Corentin departs, Oppenhiemer quietly alerts an associate over the intercom to keep close watch on their guest.
